import io
import string

fn is_palindrome(_ s: String) -> Bool
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = true
  while i < n / 2
    let left = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      -1
    end
    let right = match string.byte_at(s, n - 1 - i)
    when Some(b)
      b
    when None
      -1
    end
    if left != right
      result = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

if is_palindrome(line)
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
